text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The G2 Kinko Sho is upon us, and Silence Suzuka
is the calmest she's ever been.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Winning this race is my ticket to competing in
even faster ones.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I can hardly contain my excitement.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All I can think about is how far I'll be able to go in
this race today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I have a feeling I'm going to see something
special this time.
choice_data_list: Get to the front and take it all in!
